l outputs. Calibrate Calibrate is a modal dialog box which performs calibration of the tweezers and provides a Cancel button to interrupt it. CancelInteractiveConsole A CancelInteractiveConsole extends the jython InteractiveConsole to override meth

ds the jython InteractiveConsole to override methods allowing it to handle CancelException while running the interact() method. CancelThread A CancelThread extends Thread and allows a mechanism to cleanly pause or cancel the thread. ExecuteDialog A

leanly pause or cancel the thread. ExecuteDialog An ExecuteDialog provides a dialog box with a Go and Cancel button. GotoProbes GotoProbes is a modal dialog box which allows the user to enter probe X and probe Y deflection to go to and provides a Ca

and probe Y deflection to go to and provides a Cancel button to interrupt it. GotoXYZ GotoXYZ is a modal dialog box which allows the user to enter stage XYZ coordinates to go to and provides a Cancel button to interrupt it. GraspBlock GraspBlock is

l button to interrupt it. GraspBlock GraspBlock is a modal dialog box which performs operation of grasping a block and provides a Cancel button to interrupt it. OrthoTweezers Main window for the OrthoTweezers user interface. OrthoTweezersControl Ort

oTweezers user interface. OrthoTweezersControl OrthoTweezersControl interfaces with all the hardware of the orthotweezer system, providing control of the stage, tweezers, strain gauges, etc. OrthoTweezersMonitor Modeless dialog window for monitoring

ezersMonitor Modeless dialog window for monitoring the orthotweezers system and writing to the capture file. OrthoTweezersTools OrthoTweezersTools is a utility class for doing more sophisticated operations than are provided by the basic OrthoTweeze

ations than are provided by the basic OrthoTweezersControl class. Preferences Preferences keeps a list of key/value pairs where each is a String. RunScript RunScript is a modal dialog box which runs the given Python script and provides a Cancel but
